descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.rationale: primary microstructural length scale controlling mechanical properties

quality.loss_reason: full distribution reduced to single statistic
quality.notes: discards distribution shape and heterogeneity information

descriptors.name: crystallographic texture
descriptors.rationale: governs anisotropic mechanical and physical properties

quality.loss_reason: infinite series truncated at finite order
quality.truncation_error: depends on expansion order and texture sharpness
quality.notes: truncation error decreases with higher order expansion

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.rationale: indicates processing history and directional property variations

quality.loss_reason: reduces three-dimensional shape to single ratio
quality.notes: loses information about intermediate axis and orientation

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.rationale: controls strain hardening and flow stress

representation.notes: total line length divided by volume

quality.loss_reason: spatial distribution and character types are lost
quality.notes: ignores dislocation arrangement and type variations

descriptors.name: grain boundary character distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: statistical distribution of boundary crystallographic types
descriptors.rationale: determines grain boundary properties and material behavior

quality.loss_reason: continuous distribution discretized into finite bins
quality.truncation_error: depends on bin resolution and classification scheme
quality.notes: spatial correlations and connectivity information lost

descriptors.name: twin boundary fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: proportion of special coherent twin boundaries
descriptors.rationale: twins affect mechanical properties and deformation mechanisms

representation.encoding: real number between zero and hundred

quality.loss_reason: twin types and spatial distribution information lost
quality.notes: single statistic from full boundary character distribution

descriptors.name: misorientation angle distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: distribution of orientation differences across grain boundaries
descriptors.rationale: characterizes grain boundary network and energy distribution

representation.notes: probability density over zero to sixty-two degrees

quality.loss_reason: continuous distribution discretized and axis information lost
quality.notes: misorientation axis and spatial correlations discarded

descriptors.name: stored energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: elastic strain energy from lattice defects
descriptors.rationale: driving force for recrystallization and recovery

quality.loss_reason: spatial distribution and defect type contributions lost
quality.notes: averaging eliminates heterogeneity critical for recrystallization nucleation

representation.encoding: real number between zero and one

quality.loss_reason: spatial distribution and recrystallized grain characteristics lost
quality.notes: single fraction cannot capture transformation kinetics spatial patterns

descriptors.name: local orientation gradients
descriptors.physical_meaning: rate of lattice rotation over distance
descriptors.rationale: indicates intragranular deformation and substructure development

representation.notes: mean or RMS orientation gradient magnitude

quality.loss_reason: full spatial field reduced to single statistic
quality.notes: gradient distribution shape and directionality completely lost

descriptors.name: grain topology
descriptors.physical_meaning: connectivity pattern of grain boundary network
descriptors.rationale: influences grain growth kinetics and boundary migration

representation.encoding: histogram of face or neighbor counts

quality.loss_reason: full network structure reduced to degree distribution
quality.notes: higher-order connectivity and spatial arrangement information lost
